qualifier: [declared for Aegon II at start of Dance of the Dragons]
evidence_snippet: At the start of the Dance of the Dragons, Leygood declared for King Aegon II Targaryen and the greens.

qualifier: [assembled at the inn for conspiracy meeting]
evidence_snippet: Leygood and twelve other lords and landed knights of the Reach assembled at an inn, the Bloody Caltrops, to conspire against Hugh and Ulf.

qualifier: [fought for the greens; died at Second Battle of Tumbleton]
evidence_snippet: At the start of the Dance of the Dragons, Leygood declared for King Aegon II Targaryen and the greens.

qualifier: [joined Ormund Hightower's host; present at Tumbleton after first battle]
evidence_snippet: After the First Battle of Tumbleton and the death of Lord Ormund, the army was paralyzed in the city without a clear commander

qualifier: [conspired to kill Hugh and Ulf via the Bloody Caltrops]
evidence_snippet: Leygood and twelve other lords and landed knights of the Reach assembled at an inn, the Bloody Caltrops, to conspire against Hugh and Ulf.

qualifier: [marching with Ormund Hightower's host; died at Tumbleton before reaching destination]
evidence_snippet: he joined the host of Lord Ormund Hightower on his march to King's Landing.

qualifier: [joined Ormund's host; both fighting for the greens]
evidence_snippet: he joined the host of Lord Ormund Hightower on his march to King's Landing.
Leygood and most of his companions died during the battle.

qualifier: [conspired against Hugh Hammer and Ulf White via Bloody Caltrops]
evidence_snippet: Leygood and twelve other lords and landed knights of the Reach assembled at an inn, the Bloody Caltrops, to conspire against Hugh and Ulf.

qualifier: [conspired to kill Hugh and Ulf via the Bloody Caltrops]
evidence_snippet: Leygood and twelve other lords and landed knights of the Reach assembled at an inn, the Bloody Caltrops, to conspire against Hugh and Ulf.
Lord Unwin Peake, a fellow Caltrops, assumed the position of Hand of the King
